title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 September 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 September 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 13 September 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 14/09/2024
Ship recycling activities across all major destinations continue to struggle, with market sentiment largely negative. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-09-14_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-07-September-13-September-2024_compressed-1.pdf

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
07 September - 13 September 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling activities across all major destinations continue to struggle, with market sentiment largely negative. In India, the market has been down for
months with no signs of recovery, and hopes for improvement are fading.
